html:
<button class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow hover:bg-primary/90 px-4 py-2 dark:bg-blue-600 dark:hover:bg-blue-700 sm:px-6 sm:py-3 sm:text-base">
  Click me
</button>
description: A modern style button component with dark mode support and responsive design
customizations: Adjust padding with px-* py-* classes
Modify colors using bg-* and text-* utilities
Add icons using flex and space-x-* utilities
